options.name: -early
options.description: Reports mimimum operating conditions in 'bcwc' or 'onChipVariation' analysis mode

options.name: -tcl_list
options.description: Output will be reported in tcl list format

options.name: -view
options.description: Reports view specific operating condition (string, optional) > <file_name> # Redirect output to file (redirect_operator, optional) >> <file_name> # Redirect output to file
